desc: Project management natively in your Obsidian vault. Table, Gantt, and Kanban views with subtasks, dependencies, time tracking, and custom fields — all stored a…
descFull: Project management natively in your Obsidian vault. Table, Gantt, and Kanban views with subtasks, dependencies, time tracking, and custom fields — all stored as plain Markdown. No external services.
